creator: philippe.le.yoncourt@sacem.fr
text:
After installation from CDROM or Floppy boot & CDROM

boot sequence look like this on my server

screen 1:
---------------
F1 FreeBSD
F5 Drive 0

Default F1
---------------
F1 give beep
F0 display screen 2

screen 2:
---------------
F1: FreeBSD

Default F1
---------------
F1 continue to boot normaly

How can I simplify this, to have directly the second display, and boot automatically  ?

How-To-Repeat: each time
